get.description: Returns just enough to render the acceptance landing page: the club name, a masked email and a computed status. Never returns any ids or the token.
get.summary: Preview an invitation by token (no login required)

post.description: Accepts the invitation for the currently authenticated user. The logged-in account does NOT need to match the invited email address — the invitee may sign up with a different address. Creates/upgrades the club membership and any pre-assigned team memberships.

parameters.name: includePast
parameters.description: Include events whose kickoff is already in the past

timezone.description: IANA timezone the CSV's date/time cells are written in — send the uploader's browser zone (Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone). Missing or invalid values fall back to Europe/Berlin.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Look-ahead window in days from now

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Return messages older than the message with this id (for upward infinite scroll)

email.description: Email address, if known from the Auth0 token

name.description: Display name, if known from the Auth0 token

isSuperAdmin.description: Whether the user is a platform super admin

clubId.description: Id of the club the team belongs to

rank.description: Ordering among the club's teams of the same sport; 1 is the highest team
Ordering among the club's teams of the same sport; 1 is the highest team
Ordering among the club's teams of the same sport; 1 is the highest team

role.description: Role of the user within the club

userId.description: Id of an existing user to add to the club

role.description: Role within the club (defaults to MEMBER)
New role within the club — this is how members are promoted to club admins
Role of the user within the team

userId.description: Id of an existing user (must already be a club member) to add to the team

role.description: Role within the team (defaults to PLAYER)
New role within the team — this is how players are promoted to team admins
Role the invitee will get in the team

clubRole.description: Role the invitee will get in the club

invitedBy.description: The user who sent the invitation (null if that account was deleted)

teamId.description: Id of a team of this club to pre-assign the invitee to

role.description: Role within the team (defaults to PLAYER)

email.description: Email address to invite into the club

clubRole.description: Role within the club (defaults to MEMBER)

teamAssignments.description: Teams of this club to pre-assign the invitee to

status.description: Computed status: 'valid' (PENDING, not expired), 'expired' (PENDING but past expiry), 'revoked', or 'accepted'

token.description: The invitation token from the acceptance link

notVotedCount.description: Team members who have not voted yet

myVote.description: The caller's own vote, or null if they have not voted

teamId.description: Id of the team the event belongs to

opponent.description: Opponent — free text; required, a game needs one

row.description: 1-based index of the offending data row (header excluded)

field.description: Canonical field the error relates to, if applicable

message.description: i18n key or plain-English message for the failure

raw.description: The raw row content, for the user to locate it

updated.description: Matched an existing importKey and were changed

errorCount.description: Number of rows that failed validation

eventId.description: Id of the event voted on

updatedAt.description: When the vote was last cast or changed

teamId.description: Id of the team the event belongs to

votes.description: Every teammate's vote for this event

opponent.description: Opponent — free text; required, a game needs one

status.description: Event status; set to CANCELLED to cancel the game

choice.description: The caller's availability for this game

userName.description: Display name of the voter (for avatars / initials)

teamId.description: Id of the team the event belongs to

team.description: The team this game belongs to

clubId.description: Id of the club the team belongs to

publicKey.description: VAPID public key (URL-safe base64) for pushManager.subscribe. Empty string when push is not configured on the server.

p256dh.description: The subscription's P-256 ECDH public key (base64url)

endpoint.description: The push service endpoint URL (globally unique per device)

userAgent.description: Optional user-agent string of the subscribing device

endpoint.description: The push service endpoint URL to remove

teamId.description: Id of the team the message belongs to

author.description: Author, or null if the account was deleted

content.example: Wer bringt am Samstag die Bälle mit?

nextCursor.description: Cursor to pass as `cursor` to fetch the next (older) page, or null if this is the last page

content.description: Message text (plain UTF-8; encrypted server-side at rest)
content.example: Wer bringt am Samstag die Bälle mit?
